title: GroundplanGraph
description: v1 of the source-agnostic Terraform graph. Everything in the product renders from this shape; nothing renders from raw plan.json or HCL. Frozen: bump `version` to evolve.

version.description: 1 = docs (hcl) snapshots; 2 adds optional node impact fields (GP-22); 3 adds optional node attribute-diff fields (GP-32); 4 adds optional node parent_id containment + NSG payload (GP-42/GP-43) + IAM payload (GP-47); 5 adds the annotation-adapted projection — logical edges, group containers, display labels, notes (GP-72/GP-77). All additive/optional; all stay valid.

type.description: Resource type (aws_ecs_service) or the literal "module" for synthetic module nodes.

provider.description: Provider name (aws); null for module nodes.

module_path.description: Module names from the root down to this node's parent module.

change.description: Planned action; null for snapshots not derived from a plan (docs flow).

impacted.description: v2: unchanged node that (transitively) depends on a changed node (GP-22).

impact_distance.description: v2: hop distance to the nearest changed node.

attribute_diff.description: v3: masked per-attribute before/after diff for a changed node (GP-32). Sensitive values are masked; nested changes collapse to a marker.

attribute_diff_truncated.description: v3: true when the changed-attribute list exceeded 20 and was capped.

parent_id.description: v4: id of the containing node (vnet⊃subnet⊃resource). Absent/null when no single unambiguous parent resolves. Distinct from module `contains` edges (GP-42).

rules.description: v4: NSG security rules, on azurerm_network_security_group nodes (GP-43).

internet_exposed.description: v4: NSG has an inbound Allow from an internet source (GP-43).

associated_ids.description: v4: subnet/NIC node ids this NSG is attached to (GP-43).

role_assignment.description: v4: role-assignment payload on an azurerm_role_assignment node (GP-47). principal/scope are resolved node addresses when they reference a resource, else raw ids.

privileged.description: v4: role assignment is a high-privilege role at subscription/RG scope (GP-47).

identity.description: v4: managed-identity payload on a user-assigned identity node or a resource with an identity{} block (GP-47).

display_label.description: v5: the human-given name for this node (a `rename` annotation, GP-72). The derived `name` is always kept alongside it — a rename is a lens, never an erasure.

notes.description: v5: markdown bodies of the `note` annotations anchored to this node (GP-72).

annotation_group.description: v5: this node is a container injected from a `group` annotation, not generated from Terraform (GP-72). Renderers must distinguish it from a module container: one is what a human said, the other is what the code says.

member_count.description: v5: resources behind a group node collapsed to a single point (C4 granularity, GP-77).

kind.description: contains = module/group hierarchy; depends_on = resource dependency; logical = a relationship a human drew that the code cannot express (v5, GP-72).

inferred.description: depends_on only: true when inferred from an expression reference, false when explicitly declared (GP-20/GP-21).

label.description: v5: the edge's name — a logical edge's label (GP-72), or the aggregate count rendered on a collapsed C4 edge (GP-77).

count.description: v5: how many underlying edges this one stands for, after C4 aggregation (GP-77). Absent means one.
